title: The digital road to AI riches will be built by Nvidia, Broadcom and Marvell
text: Just as the internet needed new plumbing to function when it was developed in the 1990s, the proliferation of artificial intelligence will require a gaggle of switches, connectors and transceivers that can move a gargantuan amount of information.

title: 3 Stocks That Are Now Must-Buys on Major Deal News
text: The U.S. gross national debt exceeded $32 trillion on June 16th for the first time. This $32 trillion threshold was achieved 9 years earlier than pre-pandemic predictions indicated, mainly to the utilization of trillions of dollars in emergency funds.

title: Cisco Wants to Make AI Chips, Too -- Are Broadcom and Marvell in Trouble?

title: Marvell Technology, Inc. Declares Quarterly Dividend Payment
text: SANTA CLARA, Calif. , June 16, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Marvell Technology, Inc. (NASDAQ: MRVL), today announced a quarterly dividend of $0.06 per share of common stock payable on July 26, 2023 to shareholders of record as of July 7, 2023.

title: 3 Semiconductor Stocks Poised to Benefit From the AI Revolution
text: Broadcom, Marvell and Microchip are affordable alternatives for investors eyeing the booming AI market.

title: Marvell Technology's Dance With AI: A Reality Check On Hype And Valuation
text: Marvell's strategic positioning in the AI landscape is promising, but investors should be cautious due to the company's recent financial performance and declining revenue. MRVL's valuation appears excessive, making Broadcom a more attractive AI investment opportunity with a lower valuation and substantial AI-related revenue stream. A balanced portfolio that includes a diverse set of AI stocks is recommended for long-term growth and risk management, with thorough research and careful consideration of financials and valuations.

title: Marvell (MRVL) Unlocks Brightlane Automotive Ethernet Switches
text: Marvell (MRVL) introduces industry's highest capacity automotive ethernet switches, Brightlane Q6222 and Q6223, for in-vehicle networking.

title: Can You Still Buy the Nasdaq's Best-Performing May Stocks?
text: Datadog rode a solid quarter to stellar gains. Marvell Technology is on the artificial intelligence hype train.

title: Marvell Delivers Industry's Highest Capacity Central Automotive Ethernet Switches for In-Vehicle Networks
text: New switch family sets a benchmark in an emerging category of automotive switches to support the zonal networking architectures of next-generation vehicles. With 90 Gbps of bandwidth, the Brightlane™ Q622x switch family delivers nearly 2x the bandwidth of commercially available solutions.

title: Marvell Technology, Inc. (MRVL) Presents at Bank of America 2023 Global Technology Conference Call Transcript
text: Sirius XM Holdings Inc. (SIRI) Bank of America 2023 Global Technology Conference Call June 7, 2023 1:40 PM ET Company Participants Matt Murphy - President and Chief Executive Officer Willem Meintjes - Chief Financial Officer Conference Call Participants Vivek Arya - Bank of America Securities Vivek Arya Good morning, everyone. Welcome to this morning session.

title: Marvell Technology: Don't Buy The A.I. Fumes, Downgrade To Sell
text: We're downgrading Marvell Technology, Inc. to a sell after the recent stock run-up and promises of the A.I. boom working in the company's favor. While Marvell Technology may “double” A.I.-related sales Y/Y consistent with management's outlook, we don't believe this will meaningfully boost top-line growth and believe the stock is now over-priced. Marvell Technology's A.I.-related revenue was approximately $200M in FY2023, making up a low-digit percent of total sales.

title: Marvell Technology Stock Is Up Over 40% in a Week -- Too Late to Buy the AI Hype?
text: Marvell's stock skyrocketed when it mentioned its outlook for AI chips in the next two years. This company's outlook is promising, but market optimism may have risen too far, too fast.
